# Corner Mex UAE

> Corner Mex is a curated marketplace bringing authentic Mexican pantry — chiles, moles, masa, snacks and drinks — to restaurants, hotels, caterings, supermarkets and homes across the United Arab Emirates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Corner Mex marketplace.
- [Shop](/shop): Browse authentic Mexican chiles, salsas, masa, snacks and pantry staples delivered across the UAE.
- [B2B](/b2b): Wholesale and bulk pricing for restaurants, hotels, caterers and supermarkets.
- [Request a Quote](/b2b/quote): Submit a B2B quote request.
- [Sellers](/sellers): Verified Mexican producers and brands on the marketplace.
- [About](/about): The story behind Corner Mex and our mission in the UAE.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
